creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text: In fact ${LOCALBASE}/lib/libkrb5.so might be equally due to security/krb5. Please make Kerberos support optional, if possible. If such support is desired by the user, then let the user make a choice between security/krb5 or security/heimdal. See security/p5-GSSAPI/Makefile for valuable hints.
